Empirical analysis
                                           Descriptive statistics
                                           Table 2 presents descriptive statistics. The mean of OINV is 3.535, the standard deviation of
                                           OINV is 3.796, the minimum is 0.029, and the maximum is 18.267, indicating that the degree
                                           of overinvestment of enterprises varies greatly. The mean of TREAT×POST is 0.402, indicating
                                           that in the sample, about 40.2% of enterprises’ office addresses in pilot reform of the social
                                           credit system. IC ranges from 3.444 to 9.954, with little difference between the mean and
                                           median, indicating that the distribution of internal controls is uniform. The mean of UNCER
                                           is 1.249, and the standard deviation is 0.722, meaning that there is little difference. BER is
                                           between 62.801 and 90.630, and both the mean and median are small, showing that the
